title: Notice of control share acquisition

§137.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1987, No. 62, §1, eff. June 11, 1987; Acts 1991, No. 914, §1, eff. July 23, 1991.
